hooks.command: F=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$F" ] && exit 0; case "$F" in /Users/jehajeon/Desktop/Claude/kenos-trader/*) cd /Users/jehajeon/Desktop/Claude/kenos-trader && git add -- "$F" 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --quiet -- "$F" 2>/dev/null || git commit -m "auto: update ${F##*/}" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; true
